# Copilot Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the `copilot-instructions.md` file in the `.github` directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (C# .NET console app workspace).
- [x] Scaffold the Project (created `FourFunctionCalculator` with `dotnet new console`).
- [x] Customize the Project (skipped: Hello World starter requested).
- [x] Install Required Extensions (skipped: no required extensions were specified).
- [x] Compile the Project (`dotnet build` succeeded).
- [x] Create and Run Task (skipped: no dedicated VS Code task required for this simple console app).
- [ ] Launch the Project (pending user confirmation for debug mode).
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (`README.md` created and this file cleaned up).

- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
